product_overview: Web app to help individual freelancers record jobs, track income and job status, manage clients, and export CSV reports. Free tier provides core job and client management; users may upgrade to Pro for advanced features.
core_goals: Record each freelance engagement with client, dates, category, scope and monetary value
See a concise dashboard summary of monthly income and recent jobs
Filter, search, edit and manage job entries and client records
Export job and client data as CSV for reporting or bookkeeping
Manage user profile and upgrade plan when ready to access Pro features

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Public marketing landing page that directs visitors to sign up, log in, or learn about product features and pricing.
user_flows: / -> Click Get Started button to navigate to /register -> See registration page
/ -> Click Log In link to navigate to /login -> See login page
/ -> Click See Pro Features to scroll to pricing -> View pricing comparison and feature cards
/ -> Read FAQ accordion items -> See expanded answer content

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with name, email and password; default categories are provisioned after successful signup.
user_flows: /register -> Fill full name input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input (minimum 8 characters) -> Click Create Account button -> Redirect to /dashboard on success
/register -> Fill full name input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input (fewer than 8 characters) -> Click Create Account button -> See error message on validation failure

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password and access the authenticated dashboard.
user_flows: /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button -> Redirect to /dashboard on success
/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (invalid credentials) -> Click Sign In button -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview (Free)
features.description: At-a-glance monthly income totals, job counts and recent jobs with basic search and date scope controls appropriate for the free tier.
user_flows: /dashboard -> Select month using month picker -> View income hero card with total amount -> View recent jobs list
/dashboard -> Click Whole Year toggle button -> See year-to-date summary of income and counts
/dashboard -> Search jobs by client or project name via TopNav search -> See filtered recent jobs list
/dashboard -> Click FAB to add new job -> Navigate to /dashboard/work-log/new

features.name: Create New Job
features.description: Record a new freelance engagement with client details, dates, category, scope and contract amount.
user_flows: /dashboard/work-log/new -> Fill client name (required) -> Fill project name -> Select start date -> Select deadline date -> Select category from dropdown -> Write scope of work description -> Select status (pending, ongoing, or done) -> Enter contract amount -> Click Save Engagement button -> See new job listed in /dashboard/work-log
/dashboard/work-log/new -> Fill some fields -> Click Discard Draft to cancel -> Navigate to /dashboard/work-log and see no draft created

features.name: Work Log Management
features.description: View, filter, page through and manage all job entries; export job data as CSV and perform row-level edits and deletes.
user_flows: /dashboard/work-log -> Filter jobs by month dropdown -> Filter jobs by category dropdown -> Filter jobs by status dropdown -> See filtered job list
/dashboard/work-log -> Click New Entry button -> Navigate to /dashboard/work-log/new
/dashboard/work-log -> Change job status via status dropdown in table -> See status updated in job row
/dashboard/work-log -> Click edit button on job row to open edit modal -> Update fields in edit modal -> Save changes -> See job updated in list
/dashboard/work-log -> Click delete button on job row with confirmation -> Confirm deletion -> See job removed from list
/dashboard/work-log -> Click Export CSV button to download -> See CSV file downloaded
/dashboard/work-log -> Navigate pages with pagination controls -> See next/previous page of job rows

features.name: Client Directory
features.description: Browse aggregated client records derived from jobs, search clients, page through results and export client data as CSV.
user_flows: /dashboard/clients -> Search clients by name -> See filtered client list
/dashboard/clients -> View aggregated client revenue and job counts -> Inspect client activity summary
/dashboard/clients -> Click Export CSV of client data -> See CSV file downloaded
/dashboard/clients -> Navigate pages with pagination -> See additional client rows

features.name: User Settings
features.description: Edit profile and business details and access the option to upgrade from the free tier to Pro.
user_flows: /dashboard/settings -> Edit full name -> Edit company name -> Edit tax ID -> Edit business address -> Click Save Architect Profile button -> See updated profile information
/dashboard/settings -> Edit fields -> Click Discard Changes button -> See settings unchanged
/dashboard/settings -> Click Upgrade to Pro button -> Confirm upgrade -> See plan status updated to Pro in settings

routes.description: Landing page with hero, features, pricing, and CTA buttons
Main dashboard overview with income stats, charts, recent jobs
Work log listing all jobs with filters and pagination
Form to create a new job entry
Invoice list with status tracking and payment management (Pro)
Create new invoice by selecting billable jobs (Pro)
Tax planning dashboard with income breakdown (Pro)

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create account with name, email, and password. Auto-seeds default categories on success.
user_interactions: See error message on validation failure

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View monthly income totals, job counts, category breakdown, and recent jobs with search and month filter
user_interactions: Toggle currency between IDR and USD
Search jobs by client or project name via TopNav search
View income hero card with total amount
Click FAB to add new job

features.name: Create New Job
features.description: Register a new freelance engagement with client details, financial valuation, and status

features.name: Work Log Management
features.description: View, filter, and manage all job entries with pagination and CSV export
user_interactions: Click Export CSV button to download
Click New Entry button to add job
Change job status via status dropdown in table
Click edit button on job row to open edit modal
Click delete button on job row with confirmation

features.name: Client Directory
features.description: Aggregated client view from jobs showing revenue, job counts, and activity
user_interactions: Toggle currency display between IDR and USD

features.name: Invoice Management
features.description: View, create, and manage invoices with payment tracking and PDF generation (Pro only)
user_interactions: View invoice stats cards (receivables, aging, paid)
Click Mark as Paid to open payment modal
Fill payment amount, date, and notes in modal
Click Download PDF button on invoice row

features.name: Create Invoice
features.description: Generate invoice by selecting billable jobs, setting tax/discount, and previewing PDF
user_interactions: Check/uncheck jobs to include as line items
View auto-calculated live total in sidebar

features.name: User Settings
features.description: Update profile information, business details, and manage subscription plan
user_interactions: Click Upgrade to Pro button (free tier)

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Public landing page with navigation to features, pricing, login, and registration
user_interactions: Click Get Started button to navigate to /register
Click Log In link to navigate to /login
Click See Pro Features to scroll to pricing

known_limitations.issue: Upgrade to Pro is simulated with no real payment gateway
known_limitations.impact: Upgrade immediately changes plan to pro without billing

known_limitations.issue: Exchange rate is hardcoded at 15745 IDR/USD
known_limitations.impact: Currency conversions do not reflect real-time rates

known_limitations.issue: Notification badge counts computed server-side on each layout render
known_limitations.impact: Notifications only update on page navigation, not in real-time
